name: Glade Squatch Carnival Render
code: (function(){var c=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height,t=state.t||0;c.fillStyle='rgba(4,8,18,1)';c.fillRect(0,0,w,h);var g=c.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,h);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(20,40,80,1)');g.addColorStop(0.5,'rgba(10,20,40,1)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(6,8,14,1)');c.fillStyle=g;c.fillRect(0,0,w,h*0.7);c.fillStyle='rgba(230,235,245,1)';c.fillRect(0,h*0.7,w,h*0.3);c.save();c.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.9)';for(var i=0;i<120;i++){var sx=(i*73+(t*0.3))%w,sy=(i*53)% (h*0.7);c.fillRect(sx,sy,1,1);}c.restore();var rides=state.rides||[];for(var i=0;i<rides.length;i++){var r=rides[i],rx=r.x,ry=r.y;var offY=Math.sin((t*0.03)+i)*10;c.strokeStyle='rgba(140,190,255,0.8)';c.lineWidth=3;c.beginPath();c.moveTo(rx,ry-50);c.lineTo(rx,ry+20);c.stroke();c.save();c.translate(rx,ry-40+offY);c.rotate(Math.sin((t*0.04)+i)*0.2);c.fillStyle='rgba(40,16,70,0.95)';c.fillRect(-26,-10,52,20);c.fillStyle='rgba(230,210,255,0.9)';c.fillRect(-20,-6,16,12);c.fillRect(4,-6,16,12);c.restore();}var s=state.squatch||{x:w*0.2,y:h*0.6};c.save();c.translate(s.x,s.y);c.fillStyle='rgba(70,40,20,1)';c.beginPath();c.ellipse(0,18,14,20,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.beginPath();c.ellipse(0,0,16,14,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.fillStyle='rgba(245,240,230,1)';c.beginPath();c.ellipse(-4,-3,3,4,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.ellipse(4,-3,3,4,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.9)';c.beginPath();c.arc(-4,-3,1.3,0,Math.PI*2);c.arc(4,-3,1.3,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.strokeStyle='rgba(245,220,200,0.9)';c.lineWidth=2;c.beginPath();c.arc(0,1,4,0,Math.PI);c.stroke();c.restore();var d=state.dog||{x:w*0.7,y:h*0.7,dir:1};c.save();c.translate(d.x,d.y);c.scale(d.dir,1);c.fillStyle='rgba(190,140,80,1)';c.beginPath();c.ellipse(0,6,10,6,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.beginPath();c.ellipse(10,0,7,6,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.beginPath();c.moveTo(6,-5);c.lineTo(10,-10);c.lineTo(12,-4);c.closePath();c.fill();c.beginPath();c.moveTo(12,-5);c.lineTo(16,-10);c.lineTo(18,-4);c.closePath();c.fill();c.restore();c.save();c.globalCompositeOperation='screen';for(var j=0;j<18;j++){var lx=(j*97)%w,ly=h*0.55+Math.sin((t*0.05)+j)*6;var col=j%3===0?'rgba(255,180,120,0.9)':(j%3===1?'rgba(150,220,255,0.9)':'rgba(200,255,180,0.9)');c.fillStyle=col;c.beginPath();c.arc(lx,ly,3,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();}c.restore();})();
